message.content:
@startuml
title Search Product by ID

actor User
participant Main as "main"
participant MainMenu as "frame" MainMenu
participant ProductReportDialog as "dialog" ProductReportDialog
participant ProductDatabaseDAO as "DAO" ProductDatabaseDAO

participant Database as "Database"

User -> MainMenu: clicks 'View Products'
MainMenu -> ProductReportDialog: create
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: create

ProductReportDialog -> Database: list of products displayed
ProductReportDialog -> User: user types productID into field; clicks "Search"
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: findProd(productID)
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database: search product by ID
Database -> ProductReportDialog: resultSet
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: extract product details from ResultSet into variables
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductReportDialog: (return)
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: «construct»
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Product: product
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductReportDialog: set products fields from variables
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel: «construct»
SimpleListModel -> ProductReportDialog: updateItems(products)
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel: jList.setModel(model)
ProductReportDialog -> User: product displayed

@enduml
